nodes.text: Oh — address. Um. It's on the ID, hold on. Fourteen Overlook Apartments. Building C. It's a student complex, near campus. Me and my roommate have been there since August.

responses.text: Any chance your address has changed recently?

nodes.text: No, we just renewed the lease. Fourteen Overlook, Building C. The parking is terrible but the walls are thick and that matters when you're in finals.
Great. I'm gonna go wait over there and not touch anything. I don't want to spread strep to the whole strip mall.
